rulings.Case Title: CENTURY SURETY COMPANY VS. SAN CARLOS ROOFING, et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enter Stipulated Judgment And Stay Cross Complaint During Appeal
rulings.Rulings: DEFENDANT FIRST AMERICAN SPECIALTY INSURANCE COMPANY Motion To Enter Stipulated Judgment in favor of moving parties, Defendant and cross-defendant Nick Radoycis, dba San Carlos Roofing and Defendant First American Specialty Insurance Company and against Plaintiff and Cross-Defendant Century Surety Company; And Stay Cross Complaint During Appeal. Appearances: Michelle Bernard, Esq., of Gordon & Rees (619) 230-7769, appearing for Plaintiff, Century Surety Company, joining in motion, and also, moving party; There are no other appearances. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Granted. No opposition filed. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5797

rulings.Case Title: CENTURY SURETY COMPANY VS. SAN CARLOS ROOFING, et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Joinder In Motion To Enter Stipulated Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, January 28, 2009, line 1, PLAINTIFF CENTURY SURETY COMPANY Joinder In Motion To Enter Stipulated Judgment. is granted. No opposition filed. =(302/CWW)
